ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ended */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser running the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age range, interests) */,
  "target_platforms" TEXT /* Target platforms for the campaign (e.g., social media, search engine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the advertiser operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the advertiser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the advertiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the ad belongs to */,
  "ad_title" TEXT /* Title of the ad */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of the ad (e.g., video, image, interactive) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the ad was launched */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Content of the ad (e.g., image URL, video script) */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ad (e.g., display, native, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "impression_rate" INTEGER /* Impression rate of the ad */,
  "likeability" INTEGER /* Likeability score of the ad */,
  "dwell_time" INTEGER /* Dwell time for the ad */,
  "watch_percentage_rate" INTEGER /* Watch percentage rate of the ad */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the channel operates (e.g., social media, search engine) */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Estimated audience size for the channel */,
  "revenue_model" TEXT /* Revenue model of the channel (e.g., CPC, CPM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_channel_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel where the ad is displayed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the ad started being displayed on the channel */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the ad stopped being displayed on the channel */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Bid amount for the ad on the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_channel_mapping_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_channel_mapping_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., advertiser, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_creative_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., image, video) */,
  "asset_url" TEXT /* URL of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_creative_assets_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_targeting_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the option belongs to */,
  "targeting_type" TEXT /* Type of targeting (e.g., demographic, interest) */,
  "targeting_value" TEXT /* Value of the targeting option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_targeting_options_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_bidding_strategy" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidding strategy */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the strategy belongs to */,
  "bidding_type" TEXT /* Type of bidding (e.g., CPC, CPM) */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Bid amount for the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_bidding_strategy_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)
